Video.summary: What can the Bible tell us about life in biblical Israel? What can archaeology tell us?
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Image.alt: Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People
Biblical Israel - The Story of a People

Video.summary: Start your journey through biblical Israel with a look at the Babylonian exile.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Image.alt: By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile
By the Rivers of Babylon - Exile

Video.summary: Define key terms and outline some problems that develop when studying classical mythology.
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: Introduction to Classical Mythology

Video.summary: What do the most influential theorists say about the origin, nature, and function of myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: What Is Myth?

Video.summary: Continue examining ideas about myth, including theories of Sigmund Freud and Joseph Campbell.
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: Why Is Myth?

Video.summary: How does Hesiod's creation story compare with the version in Ovid's Metamorphoses?
Video.grandparentTitle: Classical Mythology
Video.title: First Was Chaos

Video.summary: Consider the imaginary lives of ordinary people who lived on the other side of history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Taking on the Other Side of History

Image.alt: Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History

Video.summary: Take a look at the lives of our ancestors, from ancient hominids to Homo erectus to the earliest humans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Paleolithic

Video.summary: Step into the world's earliest permanent settlement: the river banks in Mesopotamia.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Living in Mesopotamia

Video.summary: Travel to the world's first Western civilization and explore everyday life during the New Kingdom era.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Egyptian

Video.summary: Survey the stories of ancient Israel's origins as preserved in Genesis.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: Ancestor Narratives in Genesis

Video.summary: Take a closer look at Moses and the story of the Israelites' exodus from Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Biblical Israel
Video.title: Moses - The Torah's Central Hero

Video.summary: This scene-setting talk summarizes the events, particularly the Persian Wars, that spurred Herodotus to write.
Video.grandparentTitle: Herodotus: The Father of History
Video.title: Herodotus and History

Video.summary: Herodotus is not the first Greek to write about the past. What, then, makes him original?
Video.grandparentTitle: Herodotus: The Father of History
Video.title: Inquiry and the Birth of History

Image.alt: Inquiry and the Birth of History
Inquiry and the Birth of History
Inquiry and the Birth of History

Video.summary: How does Herodotus deal with the vast and complicated body of narratives that informed the Greek world?
Video.grandparentTitle: Herodotus: The Father of History
Video.title: Myth, Legend, and Oral Tradition

Video.summary: How does Herodotus model his work on the Iliad and the Odyssey?
Video.grandparentTitle: Herodotus: The Father of History
Video.title: Homeric Epic and the East-West Conflict

Image.alt: Homeric Epic and the East-West Conflict
Homeric Epic and the East-West Conflict
Homeric Epic and the East-West Conflict

Video.summary: Learn how cosmology takes the entire universe as its subject.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Journey Ahead

Video.summary: Explore the hierarchy of structures in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Denizens of the Universe

Video.summary: Is the universe lumpy, or smooth, or is it both?
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Overall Cosmic Properties

Video.summary: By far, the bulk of the universe is dark energy and dark matter.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Stuff of the Universe

Video.summary: Survey the history of the universe, from the big bang to a possible future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: The Sweep of Cosmic History

Video.summary: Learn how a "distance ladder" helps us determine distances in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Measuring Distances

Video.summary: According to Doppler shift measurements, galaxies are moving away from us.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Expansion and Age

Video.summary: Consider three important cosmological distances in the universe.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cosmology: The History and Nature of Our Universe
Video.title: Distances, Appearances, and Horizons
